suite.name: Commands

kw.name: Suite Setup Default
Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Open App
Open App Session
Get Device UDID From Tag
Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.msg: ${formatted} = [DEVICE_MAPPING] Tag mapeada para UDID | tag=getnet_p3 | udid=P31824AA70363 | timestamp=2026-05-13 16:26:53
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: [DEVICE_MAPPING] Tag mapeada para UDID | tag=getnet_p3 | udid=P31824AA70363 | timestamp=2026-05-13 16:26:53
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Retorna o UDID do dispositivo a ser usado na sessão Appium.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.msg: ${formatted} = [APP_CONNECT] Conectando ao dispositivo | udid=P31824AA70363 | tag=getnet_p3 | systemPort=8210 | appiumServer=http://192.168.20.181:4723/wd/hub | timestamp=2026-05-13 16:26:53
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: [APP_CONNECT] Conectando ao dispositivo | udid=P31824AA70363 | tag=getnet_p3 | systemPort=8210 | appiumServer=http://192.168.20.181:4723/wd/hub | timestamp=2026-05-13 16:26:53
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Open Application
kw.doc: Opens a new application to the given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.19/guides/caps/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | No | alias |

Abre a sessão Appium no dispositivo resolvido. Conecta ao device sem lançar nem resetar o app — o app deve estar aberto em foreground. Configurações de system_port e appium_server são lidas do devices.yaml via DevicesConfig.py.

kw.name: Clear Logcat
kw.doc: Clears the Android logcat buffer for the current device.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.msg: ${formatted} = [APP_OPEN] Aplicação aberta com sucesso | tag=getnet_p3 | timestamp=2026-05-13 16:27:00
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: [APP_OPEN] Aplicação aberta com sucesso | tag=getnet_p3 | timestamp=2026-05-13 16:27:00
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
Keyword de Test Setup — abre a aplicação e limpa o logcat. Use via base_<modulo>.resource no Suite Setup ou Test Setup.
Setup padrão de suite — abre a aplicação e prepara o ambiente. Use quando não há necessidade de setup específico por módulo.

test.name: Commands - Open table, select product, add observation and invoice

kw.name: Test Setup Default
Get Variable Value
kw.doc: Returns variable value or ``default`` if the variable does not exist.

kw.name: Skip
kw.arg: Teste ignorado: falha de UI detectada no teste anterior — o app pode estar em estado inválido.
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.msg: ${extras} = test=Commands - Open table, select product, add observation and invoice
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.msg: ${formatted} = [TEST_START] Iniciando teste | test=Commands - Open table, select product, add observation and invoice | timestamp=2026-05-13 16:27:00
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: [TEST_START] Iniciando teste | test=Commands - Open table, select product, add observation and invoice | timestamp=2026-05-13 16:27:00
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

Setup padrão de teste — registra início do caso de teste no log. Ignora o teste automaticamente se uma falha de UI foi detectada no teste anterior, evitando falhas em cadeia por estado inválido da interface.

kw.name: Commands - Complete Flow - Add Observation
Commands - Navigate To Open Table
Commands - Table Panel - Click Open Table
Wait Visible And Click Element
Run With Screenshot On Failure
Run Keyword
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.
Executes the given keyword with the given arguments.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

Executa uma keyword e, em caso de falha, captura screenshot e relança o erro. Centraliza o padrão TRY/EXCEPT do projeto — todas as keywords públicas deste arquivo delegam sua lógica real a uma keyword _Do via este wrapper.
Aguarda o elemento ficar visível e clica nele. Aceita timeout customizável — substitui Wait And Click Element.

kw.name: Commands - Open Table - Input Number Table
Wait Visible And Input Text
Run With Screenshot On Failure
Run Keyword
Wait Visible And Click Element
Run With Screenshot On Failure
Run Keyword
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.
Executes the given keyword with the given arguments.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

Executa uma keyword e, em caso de falha, captura screenshot e relança o erro. Centraliza o padrão TRY/EXCEPT do projeto — todas as keywords públicas deste arquivo delegam sua lógica real a uma keyword _Do via este wrapper.
Aguarda o elemento ficar visível e clica nele. Aceita timeout customizável — substitui Wait And Click Element.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Executes the given keyword with the given arguments.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.arg: Erro ao inserir texto no elemento '${locator}'
kw.doc: Executa uma keyword e, em caso de falha, captura screenshot e relança o erro. Centraliza o padrão TRY/EXCEPT do projeto — todas as keywords públicas deste arquivo delegam sua lógica real a uma keyword _Do via este wrapper.
Aguarda o elemento ficar visível, clica e insere o texto.

kw.name: Close Keyboard
Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Convert To Lower Case
kw.doc: Converts string to lower case.

kw.name: Press Keycode
kw.doc: Sends a press of ``keycode`` to the device.

kw.name: Hide Keyboard
kw.doc: Hides the software keyboard on the device if it is currently visible.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Hide Keyboard
kw.doc: Hides the software keyboard on the device if it is currently visible.

Fecha o teclado de forma segura. O método (back/hide) é lido do devices.yaml para cada tag via DevicesConfig. - back: envia keycode 4 (botão voltar Android) - hide: chama Hide Keyboard do AppiumLibrary Em caso de falha inesperada, aplica Hide Keyboard como fallback.

Fecha o teclado de forma segura. O método (back/hide) é lido do devices.yaml para cada tag via DevicesConfig. - back: envia keycode 4 (botão voltar Android) - hide: chama Hide Keyboard do AppiumLibrary Em caso de falha inesperada, aplica Hide Keyboard como fallback.
Adiciona uma observação a um item da mesa.

Executa uma keyword e, em caso de falha, captura screenshot e relança o erro. Centraliza o padrão TRY/EXCEPT do projeto — todas as keywords públicas deste arquivo delegam sua lógica real a uma keyword _Do via este wrapper.
Aguarda o elemento ficar visível e clica nele. Aceita timeout customizável — substitui Wait And Click Element.
Localiza e abre uma mesa já existente pelo número.

kw.name: Commands - Navigate To Invoice And Pay
Wait Visible And Click Element With Retry
Run With Screenshot On Failure
Run Keyword
_Do Wait Visible And Click Element With Retry
Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait Visible And Click Element
Run With Screenshot On Failure
Run Keyword
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.
Executes the given keyword with the given arguments.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

Executa uma keyword e, em caso de falha, captura screenshot e relança o erro. Centraliza o padrão TRY/EXCEPT do projeto — todas as keywords públicas deste arquivo delegam sua lógica real a uma keyword _Do via este wrapper.
Aguarda o elemento ficar visível e clica nele. Aceita timeout customizável — substitui Wait And Click Element.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Fail
kw.arg: Não foi possível interagir com o elemento '${locator}' após ${max_retries} tentativas.
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
Executes the given keyword with the given arguments.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.arg: _Do Wait Visible And Click Element With Retry
Erro ao clicar no elemento '${locator}' após ${max_retries} tentativas
kw.doc: Executa uma keyword e, em caso de falha, captura screenshot e relança o erro. Centraliza o padrão TRY/EXCEPT do projeto — todas as keywords públicas deste arquivo delegam sua lógica real a uma keyword _Do via este wrapper.
Aguarda o elemento ficar visível e tenta clicar nele. Reexecuta em caso de elemento obsoleto (stale element).

kw.name: Commands - Table Panel - Verify Panel Visible
Wait Until Element Is Visible

kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.
Fatura a mesa com o método de pagamento informado. Métodos suportados: money, pixoff
Fluxo completo: adiciona uma observação ao produto e realiza o pagamento.

kw.name: Test Teardown Default
Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.msg: ${extras} = test=Commands - Open table, select product, add observation and invoice | status=PASS
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.msg: ${formatted} = [TEST_END] Teste finalizado | test=Commands - Open table, select product, add observation and invoice | status=PASS | timestamp=2026-05-13 16:27:41
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: [TEST_END] Teste finalizado | test=Commands - Open table, select product, add observation and invoice | status=PASS | timestamp=2026-05-13 16:27:41
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

Teardown padrão de teste — captura screenshot em caso de falha. Em caso de falha, ativa o flag de suite para que testes subsequentes sejam ignorados (SKIP), evitando falhas em cadeia por estado inválido do app.

test.doc: Verifica o fluxo de abertura de mesa, seleção de produto, adição de observação e pagamento.

kw.name: Suite Teardown Default
Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Close App
Close Application
kw.doc: Closes the current application and the webdriver session.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Keyword de Test/Suite Teardown — encerra a sessão Appium com segurança.
Teardown padrão de suite — encerra a sessão Appium com segurança.

suite.doc:
Suite de regressão — módulo Commands (Comanda/Mesa)
Cobre os fluxos principais de abertura, operação e encerramento de mesas. Pré-condição: app iniciado no Painel de Mesas.
